name: Hospital
notes: Passive aura, no queue/targeting (see game-design/06-building-stats-and-defenses.md). Buildable at any base. Radius stays flat per level while heal magnitude scales — mirrors Ambulance's heal_over_time aura shape but stronger/wider since Hospital is stationary rather than mobile. No inherent level cap, only the HQ-level ceiling. HP regen follows the global rule (5% of current max HP per 5s tick), not a per-building field.
